tests.name: status server stays responsive while repo-search is running
repo-search abandons stale running status after acquiring the model lock
repo-search registers before queue wait, exposes queue diagnostics, and fails queued timeouts loudly
managed llama readiness wait is serialized by the model request queue
health reports unavailable while managed llama bootstrap is still starting
status completion flushing does not block health responses
repo-search endpoint logs one model-requested command line per tool call
buildRepoSearchProgressLogMessage formats planner and repo-search command progress lines
repo-search transcript artifact keeps routine normalized flags out of tool replay
repo-search transcript artifact replays fitted repo_read_file range using per-tool context limits
repo-search endpoint reloads executor module per request
repo-search endpoint rejects duplicated final output before sending success response
